title: How is the Computer Science program in University of Louisiana Monroe?
body: As an international student, the affordability of the university is what’s attracting me. But, I have heard many negative reviews about the computer science program there. Can anyone help me make my decision?
author: kripa111

top_comments.text: Look at Louisiana Tech and Louisiana-Lafayette. Better CS schools and they are affordable too. Mississippi State  and Alabama are affordable options as well.
top_comments.author: wrroyals

top_comments.text: What is your “decision”?  Do you have other options? If the decision is attending or not going to college at all, I’d suggest attending.
top_comments.author: RichInPitt

title: MY UNIVERSITY ULM  CAMPUS TOUR / Universität Ulm!
body:
Salam
Bro I need your urgent help.
Bro Meine masters electrical engineering and information technology main apply kia.
Mujhe admission offer hogaya mera course English aur German main hai aur mujhe admission summer 2023 semester main mila hai. Jab Meine apply kia tha Meine German language certificate nai dia tha.
Ab mujhe admission milgya hai par mere Paas language proficiency German ki nai hai.maine apply karte hue note nai kia ke mujhe German proficiency bhi required hai Ielts mera complete hai.
Kia koi aisa scenario hosakta hai ke mujhe admission winter semester main mil jaye aur main German course wahan ake Karlon.
Please need your help reply as soon as possible.

body:
LDM 첫 입문이고 하도 피부가 스킨케어를 먹어내질 못해서 큰 기대없이 흡수용도로 톰더글로우 시그니처 샀는데 개인적으로 부지런히 매일 스킨케어하고 기기 돌리고 겔마스크팩 해주니 어쨌든 평소보단 열심히 하는거라 수분이 충전돼서 피부결 매끈해지고 다음날 화장도 잘먹고 개인적으로 붉은기 개선도 느꼈어요.
기기는 지갑 사정에 따라 사고 매일 할 수 있는 사람이 사는 게 맞는 거 같아요!

title: A Day in Ulm, Germany! | Swabian Food, Ulm Minster (tallest church in the 🌎) + Historic Old Town
body: Well, all I know is that the supermarkets here are open till 9pm and 10pm!  Everything that comes after that, like 24/7 in America, I find irresponsible towards the salespeople!  they also want to have free time and be there for their families.  it makes no sense that supermarkets are open until after midnight.  the few people who still shop then, don't make a big difference in sales.
author: @pietg.6249

title: A Day in Ulm, Germany! | Swabian Food, Ulm Minster (tallest church in the 🌎) + Historic Old Town
body:
Ulm is considered by some as the gate to Upper Swabia which is the region between Ulm and Friedrichshafen at the Lake of Constance.

The big day of Ulm is called Schwörmontag which is celebrated at the end of June or the beginning of July. The mayor of Ulm is supposed to swear a public oath on a balcony of the city hall on that day. Afterwards there's a big party in the city. The special highlight of it is a procession of all kinds of vehicles able to swim floating down the Danube river. The procession is called "Nabada" (Hinunterbaden) which means something like bathing down the Danube river. There are a couple of videos on Youtube featuring that procession.
This year Schwörmontag will be celebrated on July 24th.

You can see the Alps from the top of the Ulmer Münster belfry. However mind that they're more than 100 km south of Ulm. The air needs to be very clear - a condition more often met with windy weather in spring and in autumn. You'll be able to enjoy a particularly good view of the Alps in a weather condition known as "Föhn" when masses of air are crossing the Alps and descend on their northern side causing quite strong winds and even storms sometimes. The Alps would appear as if they were just 30 - 40 km away and as if they were under/behind a magnifying glass. Then parts of the Alps within Germany, Austria and Switzerland can be seen - including for example the highest mountain of Germany, the Zugspitze. It's a quite panoramic view of the central part of the Alpine mountain range.
author: @MichaelBurggraf-gm8vl

title: A Day in Ulm, Germany! | Swabian Food, Ulm Minster (tallest church in the 🌎) + Historic Old Town

title: A day in my life at the ENS (French Graduate School)
body: bonjour mademoiselle : j'ai regardé hier (01/03/025 )votre vidéo dans laquelle vous nous montrez 1 journée de scolarité à l'ENS , ainsi que votre cadre de vie, et votre activité sportive ; ça m'a un peu peiné de voir votre chambre de bonne, si peu confortable. Je vous voudrais vous aider (à acheter ce qui vous manque) , bien que je ne sois pas spécialement riche.. Aussi , avant tout, occupez-vous toujours ce garni ? (et pour combien de temps ?) Avez-vous une idée de la façon de vous doter de ce qu'il vous faudrait ? C'est plutôt compliqué , vu que je vis à + de 800 kms de Paris ! Enfin , si  ma proposition est toujours d'actualité, je serai heureux de vous aider.
author: @gerardcolonna7835

title: A day in my life at the ENS (French Graduate School)
body:
Any chance you might be able to answer some questions about the libraries there from a prospective grad student?
1. Are they private, as in you need to be a student in order to get in? Just asking because where I did my undergrad in Canada, the libraries were public, and professional thieves would come in to steal people's stuff if they left them unattended for even a few minutes :(
2. Also, are they usually quite busy? Do you find you're able to get somewhere quiet to study at all points throughout the year?
author: @justtoleavecomments3755
